---
title: "Personal software"
date: 2026-04-15
description: "Ok, I thought my mind had been blown before, this is different"
image: ""
twitter-card:
  image: ""
open-graph:
  image: ""
categories:
  - software
  - Organisation design
  - AI
resources:
  - "img/*"
doi: ""
citation: true
draft: true
---


https://mikkelmalmberg.com/notes/01KPDNG8AM723KW4YJXRS890C1
